title: Red Hot Summer Tour
desc: Paul Kelly, Missy Higgins, The Cruel Sea, The Cat Empire, Kasey Chambers. Gates 1pm.

title: Mornington Cup + Easterland
desc: Horse racing, Easterland family zone, The Distillery Room pop-up.

title: Hill & Ridge Community Market
desc: Local produce, artisan goods, food vendors. Autumn harvest at peak.

title: Soul Night Market
desc: Atmospheric evening market on the Sorrento beachfront.

title: Mornington Racecourse Market
desc: One of the Peninsula's biggest markets with hundreds of stalls.

title: ANZAC Day Dawn Services
desc: Dawn services and marches across the peninsula.

title: New Wave 26
desc: Contemporary group exhibition showcasing emerging and mid-career artists.

title: Peninsula Hot Springs — Body Clay Ritual
desc: Signature wellness ritual using thermal clay from the springs.

title: Peninsula Hot Springs — Fire & Ice Workshop
desc: Expert-guided hot-cold contrast therapy: sauna + cold plunge.

title: Jackalope Hotel
desc: Design-forward luxury hotel in Willow Creek Vineyard. Doot Doot Doot + Rare Hare restaurants.

title: Port Phillip Estate
desc: Stunning winery accommodation with king suites overlooking the vines.

title: Lindenderry at Red Hill
desc: Gracious country house hotel set in a heritage garden.

title: Crittenden Estate Villas
desc: Self-contained vineyard villas right in the winery estate.

title: Stillwater at Crittenden
desc: Beautifully appointed lakeside villas at Crittenden Estate.

title: Sorrento & Portsea B&Bs
desc: Heritage guesthouses and boutique B&Bs for a coastal base.

title: Peninsula Hot Springs Glamping
desc: Eco lodges and glamping pods within the hot springs precinct.

title: Doot Doot Doot
desc: Theatrical fine diner. Caviar, degustation, exceptional local produce.

title: Laura at Point Leo Estate
desc: European-leaning fine diner within Point Leo Estate sculpture park.

title: Ten Minutes by Tractor
desc: Elegant produce-driven dishes with award-winning cellar.

title: Tedesca Osteria
desc: Intimate 30-seater. Rustic Italian-inflected cooking from exceptional produce.

title: Paringa Estate Restaurant
desc: Polished winery restaurant with outstanding matched wines.

title: Port Phillip Estate Restaurant
desc: Panoramic views over the estate and Port Phillip Bay.

title: Rare Hare
desc: Long communal tables, woodfired cooking, share plates and Willow Creek wines.

title: Montalto Restaurant
desc: Confident produce-driven cooking with excellent estate wines and gardens.

title: Polperro Winery
desc: Panoramic views of vines, share-plate menu, quintessential long-lunch venue.

title: Martha's Table
desc: Mediterranean dining room, casual aperitivo bar and provedore at the marina.

title: Red Gum BBQ
desc: American BBQ: pulled pork, beef brisket, smoked chicken.

title: Bistro Elba
desc: French bistro with twice-baked cheese soufflé and gin-cured ocean trout.

title: Foxey's Hangout
desc: Laidback winery brunch spot with outdoor deck and generous menu.

title: Ouest France Bistro
desc: Charming French bistro with Brittany-inspired dishes and crepes.

title: Yabby Lake Cellar Door
desc: Relaxed restaurant with excellent two- or three-course lunches.

title: Mr Vincenzo's
desc: 1970s Italian vibes, large-format pastas, fun atmosphere.

title: Ten Minutes by Tractor
desc: Three separate vineyards — Wallis, McCutcheon, Judd. Exceptional Chardonnay and Pinot Noir.

title: Pt Leo Estate
desc: 16-acre outdoor sculpture park plus fine-dining Laura restaurant.

title: Paringa Estate
desc: Oldest vines on the peninsula. Benchmark Pinot Noir.

title: Montalto
desc: Seven vineyards, gardens and sculpture trail. Outstanding Chardonnays.

title: Quealy Winemakers
desc: Intimate cellar door. Skin-contact wines and obscure Italian varieties.

title: Yabby Lake
desc: Outstanding single-vineyard Chardonnay. Precise, textural, exciting.

title: T'Gallant Vineyard
desc: Pinot Grigio pioneer. Family-friendly with Italian-style dining.

title: Moorooduc Estate
desc: Historic estate. Low-intervention wine philosophy. Elder statesman.

title: Peninsula Hot Springs
desc: 70+ globally-inspired bathing experiences. Spa Dreaming Centre for couples.

title: Pt Leo Estate Sculpture Park
desc: 16-acre outdoor gallery with 60+ works. Free to wander. Allow 2 hours.

title: Montalto Sculpture Trail
desc: Gentler sculpture walk through vineyard and gardens.

title: Red Hill Market
desc: Victoria's finest artisan market. First Saturday monthly. 200+ stalls.

title: Cape Schanck Lighthouse Walk
desc: Dramatic coastal walk to historic lighthouse. 4km return.

title: Point Nepean National Park
desc: Former defence installation. Cycling through dune scrub. 10km each way.

title: Bushrangers Bay Walk
desc: Spectacular walk to secluded ocean beach. Sea caves, towering cliffs. 5km.

title: Red Hill Hinterland Cycling
desc: Rolling hills, bike trails connecting wineries and farms.

title: Sorrento Ferry
desc: Iconic 40-min car ferry crossing. Dolphins and seals.

title: Bushrangers Bay via Cape Schanck
desc: Featured walk. Most spectacular coastal scenery near Melbourne. 6km.

title: Two Bays Walking Track
desc: Peninsula's signature long-distance trail. Bay to Strait. Bucket-list walk.

title: Cape Schanck to London Bridge
desc: Spectacular clifftop traverse along wild Bass Strait coast.

title: Lifesaving Track
desc: Historic 1890s clifftop track with breathtaking coastal views.

title: Summit Circuit Walk — Arthurs Seat
desc: Easy summit loop with bay-to-ocean views and William Ricketts sculptures.

title: Farnsworth Track
desc: Short clifftop link between Portsea Ocean Beach and London Bridge.

title: Greens Bush — Two Bays Section
desc: Most rewarding Two Bays section. Ancient grasstrees, fern gullies, birdlife.

title: Mornington Peninsula Foreshore Walk
desc: Most dog-friendly walk. Bathing boxes, clifftop lookouts, quiet beaches.

title: Sorrento Front Beach
desc: Classic bay beach. Calm, clear water, iconic bathing boxes, village access.

title: Portsea Front Beach
desc: Quieter than Sorrento. White sand, Hamptons feel, deserted in April.

title: Dromana Beach
desc: Long gentle arc near midpoint. Calm conditions, close to dining strip.

title: Safety Beach
desc: Most reliably calm swimming beach. Near Martha's Table for aperitivo.

title: Gunnamatta Ocean Beach
desc: Long, wild, remote-feeling. Powerful surf, huge skies. Walking and surfing.

title: Sorrento Back Beach
desc: Dramatic limestone cliffs, powerful surf, genuine wildness.

title: Rye Ocean Beach
desc: Near Peninsula Hot Springs. Wide, exposed, nearly empty in April.

title: Nazaaray Estate
desc: Tiny winery with 1930s train carriage guesthouses. Natural wines.

title: Allis Wine Bar
desc: Low-waste sibling of Ten Minutes by Tractor. Small plates, garden ingredients.

title: Barragunda Dining
desc: 1000-acre regenerative farm estate. Chef Simone Watts. Farm-to-table.

title: Bushrangers Bay
desc: Hidden ocean beach. 2.5km walk through coastal heathland. Deserted in April.

title: Many Little
desc: Sri Lankan flavours meet European wine bar. From the Polperro team.

title: The Bay Hotel Mornington
desc: Gastropub in heritage-listed former bank. Live music, vault dining.
